rag_rules: Fuse AGREE text only into a legal owner scope: component types for feature-level contracts and implementations for implementation-only bindings.
Preserve the AADL architecture during fusion by limiting changes to the target owner's annex text.
generic_rules: Keep inserted content in the owner that can legally see every referenced name.
Prefer extending an existing AGREE annex in the same owner rather than creating extra unrelated owner edits.
Preserve existing declarations and unrelated text outside the minimal annex change.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex wrapper syntax is `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Type-level annexes must not contain implementation-only paths; implementation-level content belongs inside the implementation owner.
anti_patterns: Do not choose an owner solely from a name match; verify legal scope and ownership.
Do not modify features, subcomponents, connections, or properties just to make the annex fit.
irrelevant_topics: scalar helper type selection and Boolean-versus-numeric comparison diagnostics
